---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the idea.

**Why is it useful?**
What problem does it solve, who benefits?

**Does it change the config format?**
If yes, please describe how (so docs and code stay in sync).

**Anything else?**
